paragraphs.body: 1. In the video creation without using AI, we spent a lot of time deciding which scene to use and how the dialogue should proceed. AI can directly present a mature video work, and we don’t need to worry about the selection of materials. We just need to adjust the inappropriate characters or backgrounds to what we want. I think it will be more convenient to use AI and save a lot of time. We encountered many difficulties when we made it ourselves. For example, in the first scene, we wanted to choose a bus station scene, but we were very entangled in which scene was most suitable and could properly arrange the two characters in this scene. And the content of the dialogue was also very brief. We tried to make the screen contain as few objects as possible, so that it would be easier to adjust. The difficulty encountered when using AI is that it cannot fully generate the more technological and modern scenes we imagined, so we changed the background frame by frame and cleared some unnecessary objects, such as bushes.

2. When using Vyond Go, the prompts I used were mainly descriptions of the changes in the two cities. I described what I expected downtown Pittsburgh and downtown Beijing to look like in 50 years, and then it generated a simple video of two people chatting. The content of the chat between the two people includes many of the key points I mentioned. I didn't add too many requirements in the prompt because I was worried that AI could not understand what I meant and would make too many mistakes in the video.

3. I think the strength of AI in creating content is that they can complete the creation of a video very quickly. But its disadvantage is that it cannot fully meet the content we envisioned. The content presented may be too simple or ordinary, and we need to constantly add details to get the finished product we want. I think AI provides us with the most basic templates, but more creative ideas still need to be realized by ourselves.

4. I am quite satisfied with the video generated by AI. First, I think it presents all the important content. Secondly, there are no errors in its production, and the whole video is very smooth. What surprised me is that in addition to ordinary dialogue scenes, it can also analyze emotions and add a frame with special effects based on this emotion, which makes the whole video less monotonous.

5. After AI generated the video, we also made many changes. We changed the characters and the voices of the characters in the video to the characters we created before, so that we can maintain consistency with another video. In addition, we changed the scene to a more prosperous and modern city high-rise building as the background, instead of using its original garden background. I think this is more in line with the scene we envisioned 50 years later. In addition, we also modified the background music. The original background music sounded a bit boring, and we changed it to a more interesting and humorous style. I think these changes are necessary because it makes the whole video more in line with our theme and more vivid.
